25/06/2025, 23:41 Corporate group | AUSTRAC

\@ Australian Government
AUSTRAC

Corporate group

Home / Corporate group

A group of two or more related bodies corporate. Two bodies corporate are related if any
of the following are true:

e one is a holding company of the other
e one is a subsidiary of the other

e one is a subsidiary of a holding company of the other.
Each is a separate legal entity with limited liability.
See
AML/CTF Act 2006 section 123 (12)

Corporations Act 2001 section 50

https:/Awww.austrac.gov.au/glossary/corporate-group
